title: Smoky Gooey Casserole
description: A rich and creamy casserole featuring smoky flavors and gooey goodness. Inspired by Ukrainian comfort food.

ingredients.name: Smoky sausage
ingredients.notes: Look for Ukrainian-style sausage or use a similar variety

ingredients.name: Casserole noodles
ingredients.notes: Wide egg noodles or pappardelle work well

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Sweet or yellow onions are good choices

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Use fresh garlic for the best flavor

instructions: Cook casserole noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, cook sliced sausage over medium-high heat until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add diced onion and minced garlic to the skillet. Cook until the onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in aoli and cook for an additional minute.
In a large mixing bowl, combine cooked noodles, sausage mixture, and shredded cheese.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
